Details:
Granular activated carbon (GAC) has been identified as a best available technology (BAT) for the removal of alachlor.  Removal of alachlor from water by tailored or modified GAC can be very effective (almost 100 percent). Tailored or modified GAC pre-loaded bioactive adsorbers also demonstrated effective adsorption of alachlor.
The effectiveness of GAC for alachlor removal from water in practical applications is adversely affected by backgorund organics compounds, such as humic acids[727].
